perturbation.original_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in Paragraphs 9 and 10, ESSI shall have the right to use the name, image, likeness, characterization, visual and audio representation of Talent ("Talent Attributes") in connection with the ESSI product suite, in the venue(s) as follows: A. Promotional Territories ("Territories") shall include various online, outdoor, radio and television promotional spots (specific promotional spots and content specifics to be mutually agreed upon) promoting the ESSI product suite ("Commercial Placements") aired in various venues as determined to best suit the needed promotion of ESSI products; B. On ESSI's downloaded apps (UseHerbo, Herbo Wallet, FitRx) and websites (www.useherbo.com; www.eccossi.com) ("Websites"), of which new ESSI owns and operates downloadable apps and websites may be added to this list at the will of ESSI; and C. ESSI Natural Supplementation Products. D. In ESSI product-related press releases (of which only ESSI may produce and publish).
perturbation.changed_text: During the Term and subject to the limitations set forth in Paragraphs 9 and 10, ESSI shall have the right to use the name, image, likeness, characterization, visual and audio representation of Talent ("Talent Likeness") in connection with the ESSI product suite, in the venue(s) as follows: A. Promotional Territories ("Areas") shall include various online, outdoor, radio and television promotional spots (specific promotional spots and content specifics to be mutually agreed upon) promoting the ESSI product suite ("Marketing Campaigns") aired in various venues as determined to best suit the needed promotion of ESSI products; B. On ESSI's downloaded apps (UseHerbo, Herbo Wallet, FitRx) and websites (www.useherbo.com; www.eccossi.com) ("Digital Platforms"), of which new ESSI owns and operates downloadable apps and websites may be added to this list at the will of ESSI; and C. ESSI Natural Supplementation Products. D. In ESSI product-related press releases (of which only ESSI may produce and publish).
perturbation.explanation: The terms 'Talent Attributes', 'Territories', 'Commercial Placements', and 'Websites' are replaced with 'Talent Likeness', 'Areas', 'Marketing Campaigns', and 'Digital Platforms', respectively, without defining that they are equivalent. This creates ambiguity as to whether ESSI's rights are restricted to only using "Talent Likeness" or if that term encompasses all "Talent Attributes," specifically in section 9. Review, Approval, and Ownership of Commercial Placements. All ESSI uses of Talent Attributes in connection with the Commercial Placements and/or press releases shall be subject to the prior written approval of Talent. Said written approval must be given within five (5) business days of Talent's receipt or said usage shall be deemed unapproved. Any such usage featuring Talent in the Commercial Placements and/or press releases shall be and remain the property of ESSI; however, ESSI shall have the right to use said Commercial Placements and/or press releases solely as outlined in Paragraph 3 and only during the Term. Talent may use said materials in whole or in part solely for the purpose of presenting Talent's work in Talent's personal portfolio, website or otherwise and/or on Talent's agent's website. Such usage may not be sold or transferred.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Review, Approval, and Ownership of Commercial Placements. All ESSI uses of Talent Attributes in connection with the Commercial Placements and/or press releases shall be subject to the prior written approval of Talent. Said written approval must be given within five (5) business days of Talent's receipt or said usage shall be deemed unapproved. Any such usage featuring Talent in the Commercial Placements and/or press releases shall be and remain the property of ESSI; however, ESSI shall have the right to use said Commercial Placements and/or press releases solely as outlined in Paragraph 3 and only during the Term. Talent may use said materials in whole or in part solely for the purpose of presenting Talent's work in Talent's personal portfolio, website or otherwise and/or on Talent's agent's website. Such usage may not be sold or transferred.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'Talent Attributes' with 'Talent Likeness' and redefines other terms like 'Territories' to 'Areas' and 'Commercial Placements' to 'Marketing Campaigns', but doesn't state they are equivalent. The contradicted text (Paragraph 9) refers to 'Talent Attributes' and 'Commercial Placements'. Since the new language in Paragraph 3 uses different terms, it creates ambiguity about whether ESSI's use of Talent Likeness in Areas and Marketing Campaigns is subject to the approval process outlined in Paragraph 9, since Paragraph 9 refers specifically to the original terms. This creates a direct conflict and uncertainty, making the approval requirement unclear.

perturbation.original_text: Talent represents that the services hereunder shall not be subject to SAG, AFTRA or any other entertainment guild contract of which Talent is now, has been, or will be in the future, bound to and that this Agreement is not in conflict with any contract Talent is bound.
perturbation.changed_text: Talent represents that the performances hereunder shall not be subject to SAG, AFTRA or any other entertainment guild contract of which Talent is now, has been, or will be in the future, bound to and that this Agreement is not in conflict with any arrangement Talent is bound.
perturbation.explanation: Replacing "services" with "performances" and "contract" with "arrangement" makes it unclear if Talent's broader obligations as a 'Spokesperson' are subject to the same exclusions and representations or just Talent's performance. This change directly impacts the scope of the 'duties set forth in Paragraph 4', creating confusion about what constitutes a breach in Paragraph 10.A. ESSI shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days prior written notice to Talent in the event Talent fails to perform the duties set forth in Paragraph 4 hereof or breaches any other covenant or agreement set forth herein and fails to cure same (if curable) within seven (7) days of receipt of written notice. Such termination shall relieve ESSI of its obligation to provide any further consideration pursuant to this Agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: ESSI shall have the right to terminate this Agreement upon ten (10) days prior written notice to Talent in the event Talent fails to perform the duties set forth in Paragraph 4 hereof or breaches any other covenant or agreement set forth herein and fails to cure same (if curable) within seven (7) days of receipt of written notice. Such termination shall relieve ESSI of its obligation to provide any further consideration pursuant to this Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text refers to "services" and "contract", implying that Talent's broader obligations are covered. The changed text narrows this to "performances" and "arrangement", creating ambiguity about whether all of Talent's duties as a 'Spokesperson' are subject to the same exclusions. This ambiguity directly contradicts the contradicted text, because it makes it unclear what constitutes a breach of 'the duties set forth in Paragraph 4', potentially affecting ESSI's right to terminate the agreement.

perturbation.original_text: Talent's endorsement and position of spokesperson of ESSI is for the sole purpose of the endorsement of the Company's products, and to offer information, based upon Talent's use and knowledge of ESSI's products.
perturbation.changed_text: Talent's testimonial and role as advocate of ESSI is for the sole purpose of the testimonial of the Company's products, and to offer information, based upon Talent's experience and insight of ESSI's products.
perturbation.explanation: The terms 'endorsement', 'spokesperson', 'use' and 'knowledge' are replaced with 'testimonial', 'advocate', 'experience', and 'insight', respectively, without defining that they are equivalent. This creates ambiguity as to whether Talent's obligations are restricted to only testimonials or if that term encompasses all the spokesperson activities. This is creating in-text contradition as Paragraph 1. Engagement. ESSI engages Talent and Talent hereby accepts the engagement to act as a Spokesperson for ESSI, and to provide his endorsement of all ESSI products and services, domestically and worldwide.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Engagement. ESSI engages Talent and Talent hereby accepts the engagement to act as a Spokesperson for ESSI, and to provide his endorsement of all ESSI products and services, domestically and worldwide.
perturbation.justification: The changed text replaces 'endorsement' and 'spokesperson' with 'testimonial' and 'advocate', respectively, without explicitly stating they are equivalent. The contradicted text explicitly states Talent is engaged to act as a 'Spokesperson' and provide 'endorsement'. The modified language introduces ambiguity about whether Talent's obligations are restricted only to testimonials or encompass all the spokesperson activities, thereby conflicting with the original engagement terms. This is a Misaligned Terminology - In Text Contradiction.
